[section bg="496" bg_size="original" bg_overlay="rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.68)" padding="70px"] [row style="collapse"] [col span__sm="12"] [ux_text font_size="1.7" text_align="center" text_color="rgb(19, 19, 19)"]

Website Service

[/ux_text] [ux_text font_size="1.2" text_align="center" text_color="rgb(19, 19, 19)"]

Businesses come in all shapes and sizes, just like websites.

[/ux_text] [ux_text font_size="1.2" text_align="center" text_color="rgb(19, 19, 19)"]

Our sites are custom-built around your brand. Here's a bit of an overview of the different websites we are commonly asked about, and a pricing guide on how much you might spend.

[/ux_text] [/col] [/row] [/section] [section padding="60px"] [row] [col span="4" span__sm="12"] [ux_price_table title="Small Business Website" price="From $1500" description="5-page templated website with Content Management System" bg_color="rgb(234, 239, 255)" class="service_pricing"] [button text="Order Now"] [/ux_price_table] [/col] [col span="4" span__sm="12"] [ux_price_table title="Professional Business Website" price="From $3500" description="Upto 10 page scustom website with Content Management System, Booking multiple forms etc." bg_color="rgb(234, 239, 255)" class="service_pricing"] [button text="Order Now"] [/ux_price_table] [/col] [col span="4" span__sm="12"] [ux_price_table title="E-commerce Website" price="From $7500" description="Upto 20 pages, 50 product uploads, full fuctional with ecommerce functionality." bg_color="rgb(234, 239, 255)" class="service_pricing"] [button text="Order Now"] [/ux_price_table] [/col] [/row] [/section] [section bg="516" bg_overlay="rgba(90, 73, 248, 0.622)" padding="60px"] [row style="collapse"] [col span__sm="12"] [ux_text font_size="1.7" text_align="center" text_color="rgb(19, 19, 19)"]

Our Process

[/ux_text] [/col] [/row] [gap] [row style="large"] [col span="6" span__sm="12"] [featured_box img="517" pos="center"] [ux_text text_color="rgb(255, 255, 255)"]

Quote

Let's kickstart the excitement! We're ready to arrange an in-person meeting, or if needed, a phone/video call, to dive deep into website planning. During this phase, you'll be making crucial choices regarding design elements, color schemes, text content, imagery, page layout, and other essential functionalities. This step will define the project's requirements for our team and establish clear expectations for our valued clients.

[/ux_text] [/featured_box] [/col] [col span="6" span__sm="12"] [gap height="150px" height__sm="0px"] [featured_box img="518" pos="center"] [ux_text text_color="rgb(255, 255, 255)"]

Design

We'll create and showcase a preliminary homepage design for your consideration and endorsement. At this stage, we eagerly await your feedback, and we'll promptly implement any required adjustments until you are completely satisfied with the design. This final homepage design will serve as the foundation for the entire website, underscoring the significance of achieving precision and excellence in this phase.

[/ux_text] [/featured_box] [/col] [col span="6" span__sm="12"] [featured_box img="519" pos="center"] [ux_text text_color="rgb(255, 255, 255)"]

Content

During this phase, our focus shifts to the meticulous arrangement of the content you've supplied for your website in a visually appealing and coherent manner. This content encompasses a wide array of elements such as text, images, videos, call-to-action banners, graphics, accreditation and award badges, and more. If, at any point in the project, you find yourself in need of assistance in content creation, rest assured that New castlehub can provide a separate quote for this service. We have a proficient in-house team consisting of writers, photographers, videographers, and graphic designers at your disposal.

[/ux_text] [/featured_box] [/col] [col span="6" span__sm="12"] [gap height="150px" height__sm="0px"] [featured_box img="520" pos="center"] [ux_text text_color="rgb(255, 255, 255)"]

Review

The entire website construction process is now complete, with all functionalities seamlessly integrated and the content meticulously placed. It's time for the final inspection to ensure that everything aligns with your expectations. It's worth noting that websites, much like the home you reside in, are never truly 'finished.' You have the flexibility to continuously modify, update, and enhance your website as needed. If you come across any changes that you'd like to implement, please provide us with your feedback so that we can prepare for the Quality Assurance (QA) phase and make your desired adjustments.

[/ux_text] [/featured_box] [/col] [col span="6" span__sm="12"] [featured_box img="520" pos="center"] [ux_text text_color="rgb(255, 255, 255)"]

Live and Quality Assurance

Undoubtedly one of the most crucial phases, our team of technical experts conducts a comprehensive assessment of the website to uphold the highest quality standards. This entails a meticulous review covering various aspects such as spellings, broken links, image file sizes, meta tags, functionality of enquiry forms, and website loading speed. Any issues identified during this process are promptly addressed and rectified.

Once your new website successfully clears the Quality Assurance phase, it's time for the exciting moment: your website goes live and is accessible online! Following the QA approval, we activate the website, allowing you to start reaping the benefits it brings to you or your business.

[/ux_text] [/featured_box] [/col] [col span="6" span__sm="12"] [gap height="150px" height__sm="0px"] [featured_box img="520" pos="center"] [ux_text text_color="rgb(255, 255, 255)"]

Support

Whether you've subscribed to one of our hosting and maintenance packages, or you require occasional assistance, Jezweb is committed to being your reliable partner in keeping your website up-to-date, visually appealing, and functioning smoothly. While certain forms of support may incur charges, please know that we're always here to provide you with the necessary guidance, advice, and options to ensure your website remains in top shape. Your satisfaction and website's success are our priorities.

[/ux_text] [/featured_box] [/col] [/row] [/section] [section bg_color="rgb(243, 243, 243)" padding="50px"] [row style="collapse"] [col span__sm="12"] [ux_text font_size="1.7" text_align="center" text_color="rgb(19, 19, 19)"]

Take Precedence

[/ux_text] [gap height="15px"] [ux_text font_size="1.2" text_align="center"]

Sound right for you? Get in touch with us and we can have a chat!

[/ux_text] [/col] [/row] [row width="custom" custom_width="700px"] [col span="3" span__sm="12"] [featured_box img="463" pos="center" link="mailto: hello@newcastlehub.info"] [ux_text text_color="rgb(61, 61, 61)"]

E-mail Us

[/ux_text] [/featured_box] [/col] [col span="3" span__sm="12"] [featured_box img="465" pos="center" link="tel:0240755307"] [ux_text text_color="rgb(61, 61, 61)"]

02 40755307

[/ux_text] [/featured_box] [/col] [col span="3" span__sm="12"] [featured_box img="467" pos="center"] [ux_text text_color="rgb(61, 61, 61)"]

Find Us

[/ux_text] [/featured_box] [/col] [col span="3" span__sm="12"] [featured_box img="467" pos="center"] [ux_text text_color="rgb(61, 61, 61)"]

9-5 Mon-Fri*

[/ux_text] [/featured_box] [/col] [/row] [/section] [section padding="60px" bg_color="rgb(243, 243, 243)"] [row] [col span__sm="12"] [ux_text]

Website Service for Newcastle businesses: fast, mobile-friendly websites built to convert visitors into enquiries.

Website Service FAQ

How long does a website project take?

Most small business sites take 2–4 weeks depending on pages, content, and approvals.

Do you include on-page SEO?

Yes. We structure pages for search intent, improve speed, and set clear internal links.

Can you redesign an existing site?

Yes. We can improve performance and conversions without a full rebuild when possible.

What do you need from me?

Your logo/brand assets (if any), business details, and examples of sites you like.

Get a website quote

Request a quote

content.rendered:
Website Service

Businesses come in all shapes and sizes, just like websites.

Our sites are custom-built around your brand. Here’s a bit of an overview of the different websites we are commonly asked about, and a pricing guide on how much you might spend.

Small Business Website
From $1500
5-page templated website with Content Management System
Order Now
Professional Business Website
From $3500
Upto 10 page scustom website with Content Management System, Booking multiple forms etc.
Order Now
E-commerce Website
From $7500
Upto 20 pages, 50 product uploads, full fuctional with ecommerce functionality.
Order Now

Our Process

Quote

Let’s kickstart the excitement! We’re ready to arrange an in-person meeting, or if needed, a phone/video call, to dive deep into website planning. During this phase, you’ll be making crucial choices regarding design elements, color schemes, text content, imagery, page layout, and other essential functionalities. This step will define the project’s requirements for our team and establish clear expectations for our valued clients.

Design

We’ll create and showcase a preliminary homepage design for your consideration and endorsement. At this stage, we eagerly await your feedback, and we’ll promptly implement any required adjustments until you are completely satisfied with the design. This final homepage design will serve as the foundation for the entire website, underscoring the significance of achieving precision and excellence in this phase.

Content

During this phase, our focus shifts to the meticulous arrangement of the content you’ve supplied for your website in a visually appealing and coherent manner. This content encompasses a wide array of elements such as text, images, videos, call-to-action banners, graphics, accreditation and award badges, and more. If, at any point in the project, you find yourself in need of assistance in content creation, rest assured that New castlehub can provide a separate quote for this service. We have a proficient in-house team consisting of writers, photographers, videographers, and graphic designers at your disposal.

Review

The entire website construction process is now complete, with all functionalities seamlessly integrated and the content meticulously placed. It’s time for the final inspection to ensure that everything aligns with your expectations. It’s worth noting that websites, much like the home you reside in, are never truly ‘finished.’ You have the flexibility to continuously modify, update, and enhance your website as needed. If you come across any changes that you’d like to implement, please provide us with your feedback so that we can prepare for the Quality Assurance (QA) phase and make your desired adjustments.

Live and Quality Assurance

Undoubtedly one of the most crucial phases, our team of technical experts conducts a comprehensive assessment of the website to uphold the highest quality standards. This entails a meticulous review covering various aspects such as spellings, broken links, image file sizes, meta tags, functionality of enquiry forms, and website loading speed. Any issues identified during this process are promptly addressed and rectified.

Once your new website successfully clears the Quality Assurance phase, it’s time for the exciting moment: your website goes live and is accessible online! Following the QA approval, we activate the website, allowing you to start reaping the benefits it brings to you or your business.

Support

Whether you’ve subscribed to one of our hosting and maintenance packages, or you require occasional assistance, Jezweb is committed to being your reliable partner in keeping your website up-to-date, visually appealing, and functioning smoothly. While certain forms of support may incur charges, please know that we’re always here to provide you with the necessary guidance, advice, and options to ensure your website remains in top shape. Your satisfaction and website’s success are our priorities.

Take Precedence

Sound right for you? Get in touch with us and we can have a chat!

E-mail Us

02 40755307

Find Us

9-5 Mon-Fri*

Most small business sites take 2–4 weeks depending on pages, content, and approvals.
